expectations.text: spline_data_element_created: A data_element create spline command defines the X stiffness table
expectations.evidence: data_element create spline with spline_name = .rubber_mount.x_force_spline is present

expectations.text: general_force_used: force create direct general_force is used for the X-direction force
expectations.evidence: force create direct general_force with general_force_name = .rubber_mount.rubber_mount_gforce

expectations.text: akispl_in_x_force_function: x_force_function uses AKISPL() based on DX displacement
yz_force_functions_linear: Y and Z translational stiffness of 5000 N/mm implemented
rotational_functions_200: Rotational stiffness of 200 N·mm/deg implemented
expectations.evidence: x/y/z_torque_function = "(-200.0 / 1D) * AX/AY/AZ(...)" for all three rotational axes

expectations.text: mass_properties_uses_modify: Mass/inertia set with part modify rigid_body mass_properties, not part create
expectations.evidence: Both chassis and subframe use part modify rigid_body mass_properties

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All names use full dot-path e.g. .rubber_mount.chassis.cm, .rubber_mount.subframe.bush_i

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No occurrence of adams_id found in bushing.cmd

expectations.text: creates_cm_and_passes_center_of_mass_marker: A .cm marker is explicitly created on each rigid part BEFORE part modify mass_properties is called, and center_of_mass_marker is passed in every part modify rigid_body mass_properties call
expectations.evidence: .rubber_mount.chassis.cm and .rubber_mount.subframe.cm both created before their respective part modify mass_properties calls; center_of_mass_marker passed in both

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape is added to each moving part
expectations.evidence: chassis has geometry create shape ellipsoid chassis_geo; subframe has geometry create shape ellipsoid subframe_geo

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: Log shows 'batch run is finished' / 'Finished -----'; no Adams ERROR: lines; only harmless Python sys.excepthook traceback (not Adams errors)
